name: structured-design-doc
description: Structured design document plugin for design solutions, relational database table design, and REST API specifications.

interface.shortDescription: Structure design solution, database, and REST API documents with reusable rules and templates.
interface.longDescription: A documentation-focused plugin that standardizes design solution, relational database table design, and HTTP/REST API design outputs. It separates shared writing rules, standalone templates, and routing skills so future design document types can be added without rewriting the core workflow.
defaultPrompt: Write a structured technical design solution for an order fulfillment system.
Write a structured database table design document for a new order system.
Write a structured REST API design spec for user profile management.
Route my backend design request into database and API sections with fixed templates.
